property.name: Four Haus Residence
property.amenitiesLevel: There is no amenties in this building

lockbox.popup:
Lockbox Location
  • Lockbox located on Harwood Lane across the street from the property.
  • Please open the lockbox labelled 4H with the passcode provided in the message
  • You should be able to see 2 key cards in the lockbox

steps.title: Step 1 – Collect the keys from the lockbox
steps.text: The lockbox is located on Harwood Lane across the street from the property

steps.title: Step 1 – Collect the keys from the lockbox
steps.text: The lockbox is located on Harwood Lane across the street from the property

steps.title: Step 2 – Parking entrance is located near the middle of Harwood Lane
steps.text: Tap your key card on the reader to open the gate

steps.title: Step 1 – Building Entry
steps.text: Scan the key card against the reader until you hear a beep. The glass door should open.

steps.title: Step 2 – Walk towards the Lift lobby
steps.text:
Proceed to lift lobby.
You are on LEVEL 25, only use the lifts on the left with High Rise Access

steps.title: Step 3 – Enter the lift
steps.text: Scan the key card on the reader and press level 25

steps.title: Step 4 – Turn right after exiting the lift
steps.text:
After exiting the lift, turn right into the corridor.
The apartment is located at the end of the corridor.

steps.title: Step 5: Welcome to your home away from home
steps.text:
Door Opening Instructions:
1. Insert the GREEN key into the top keyhole.
2. Turn the key clockwise and
3. Pull down the door handle at the same time while pushing the door open.

houseRules: Please keep the access cards and remote safe and respect building rules.
Please keep the volume down after 10:00 PM.
A fee of $200 will be charged for the replacement of each access card and remote.
